$schema_doc: Phase O4-VPM-INTEGRATION Stream A.3 draft manifest. Lifecycle: Draft Manifest per VBDIP-0002A section 10. NO compiler body ships in this phase; this JSON declares the wrapper shape a future Phase O5 compiler will consume.
name: Tournament Check-in Pass

tournament_id.description: Tournament identifier per VAPI tournament canonical id

tournament_name.description: Display title; HTML-escaped at render time

gamer_address_hash.description: SHA-256 of gamer wallet address (caller-supplied; bridge does not learn the address)

vhp_token_id.description: VHP token bound to the gamer; chain.is_vhp_valid(token_id) consulted offline at compile time

is_fully_eligible.description: VAPIProtocolLens.isFullyEligible(device_id) view result; the singular composability gate

device_id_hash.description: Canonical device identifier hash per Phase O3 TOURNAMENT artifact

check_in_window_start_ts_ns.description: Tournament check-in window opens at this timestamp

check_in_window_end_ts_ns.description: Tournament check-in window closes at this timestamp

qr_payload_hash_hex.description: SHA-256 of the QR scan payload bytes; verifier reproduces the QR contents and compares

limitations: Per-tournament check-in artifact; eligibility is asserted relative to the tournament_id at check-in window time
QR contents must be reproduced from the wrapped ZKBA manifest by the verifier; this VPM does not embed the QR image

references.registry: VBDIP-0002A section 10 row 3 (QR-ELIGIBILITY-v1 / Tournament Check-in Pass / Organizers / Reserved)

promotion_rules.to_compiler_target: Author scripts/vpm_compile_qr_eligibility.py with build_qr_eligibility_artifact(...) consuming this input schema. Inline QR rendering via deterministic SVG (NO external resources; ASCII-art fallback for non-SVG-capable consumers).
promotion_rules.to_test_fixture: Add bridge/tests/test_phase_o5_vpm_qr_eligibility.py with T-VPM-QRE-1..8 + T-VPM-GRAMMAR x6 + a QR-payload-reproduction test verifying SHA-256(QR-bytes) == qr_payload_hash_hex.
promotion_rules.to_active: Operator governance ceremony. Requires tournament-organizer partnership flow + check-in-station SDK integration before Active status.

non_authoritative_notes: This draft manifest is documentation-only. It does not grant runtime authority. The QR check-in flow itself remains gated by VAPIProtocolLens.isFullyEligible() per the existing Phase O3 TOURNAMENT primitive; this VPM is a presentation surface, not an authority gate.
